title: Darxy's Death Scythe
description: A powerful and rare scythe that causes the Wither effect upon striking an enemy.
body:
### Lore and Explanation
A feared and extremely difficult weapon to craft, this scythe holds the very essence of the Wither. Its blade is forged from a dense, black liquid that constantly shifts and drips as if it has a will of its own. Ancient runes glow along its surface, radiating a cursed energy that deepens its bond with absolute darkness.

When wielded, every strike spreads the Wither effect not only to its target but to all creatures nearby that suffer damage at the same moment, turning the battlefield into a living plague. Yet, despite its overwhelming power, the scythe offers its wielder another advantage besides ruling the battlefield: protection from the Wither effect itself

### How to Start
To begin your adventure to conquer this Relic, you must craft the manual using a **book, black dye, and a bone** in a crafting table. Once crafted, **drop the item**, and you will receive the manual.

### Command
If you just want the Scythe without crafting, and you have OP, you can use **/function deathh:craft_scythe** to give yourself the Scythe.
